title.rendered: Portable Office Cabin Manufacturers in Bangalore

content.rendered:
SAMAN Portable is a direct portable office cabin manufacturer in Bangalore, fabricating cabins at our own unit in Gopasandra, Bengaluru 560099. We design, build, deliver, and install — so you buy your office cabin from the factory that makes it, not from a reseller or a directory listing.

This page explains the cabin types we manufacture, realistic sizes and specifications, how customisation works, and how to get a factory-direct price for delivery anywhere in Bangalore and South India.

Why a factory-direct office cabin matters

A portable office cabin is a ready-to-use, relocatable workspace built on a steel frame and finished with insulated panels. Buying direct from the manufacturer changes three things for the better:

  • Price clarity: the quote comes from the people who cut the steel and fit the panels, with no reseller margin.
  • Real customisation: size, door and window positions, interior layout, electrical points, and finish are built to your need, not picked from a fixed catalogue.
  • Accountable delivery: one Bengaluru team handles fabrication, transport, and installation.

SAMAN POS India Private Limited has served India since 2009 and was incorporated in 2019. We are ISO 9001:2015 certified with Udyam, Startup India, ZED, and NSIC registrations, and our frames are built to IS 2062 steel standards.

Office cabin types we manufacture

  • MS (steel) office cabins — strong, long-life cabins on an IS 2062 mild-steel frame; the standard choice for site and long-term office use.
  • Insulated panel office cabins — wall and roof panels (around 50 mm) for heat and sound control in Bangalore's climate.
  • Multi-cabin and double-storey offices — joined units or stacked floors where you need more built-up area on a small footprint.
  • Cabins with toilet or pantry — self-contained office units with attached utilities.

For the full range, see our portable office cabins and our factory-built MS porta cabins.

Typical sizes and specifications (customisable)

Common cabin sizes include 10×8 ft, 12×8 ft, 16×8 ft, 20×8 ft, and 40×8 ft, with standard internal height around 8–9 ft. These can be customised:

  • Frame: IS 2062 mild-steel structural frame and base.
  • Walls and roof: insulated sandwich panels (around 50 mm, with EPS, rock wool, or PUF cores) for heat and sound insulation.
  • Openings: doors, windows, and ventilation positioned to your layout.
  • Interiors: electrical points, lighting, flooring, and optional AC provision fitted at the factory.
  • Finish: coated steel and panel finishes suited to outdoor site conditions.

If a size or feature is not listed, it can usually be customised — tell us how the cabin will be used and we will build to it.

Made in Bengaluru, delivered factory-direct

Our unit at Gopasandra, Bengaluru 560099 supplies office cabins across Bangalore — including Whitefield, Electronic City, HSR Layout, Koramangala, Peenya, and surrounding areas — and across South India. Cabins are fabricated at the factory and delivered as ready units, then placed and connected on site by our team.

The process is straightforward: requirement discussion, size and layout confirmation, factory build, delivery, and on-site placement. Lead time depends on size and customisation and is confirmed at order.

Warranty and after-sales

Cabins are covered by 5 years structural frame and base + 1–2 years finishing + 20–25 years engineered service life. The 5-year cover is on the structural frame and base, 1–2 years on finishing items, and 20–25 years is the engineered service life of the structure — not a warranty period. Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery or installation as per policy.

We have completed 500+ projects across India and can discuss requirements relevant to your industry at enquiry.

Get a factory-direct price

For an accurate quote, share the cabin size, intended use, insulation and interior needs, and delivery location. We will confirm specification and a factory-direct price.

Contact the Bangalore manufacturing unit

  • Call or WhatsApp: +91 62009 09435
  • Hours: Mon–Sat, 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM (Sunday closed)

You can also browse the complete porta cabin range for related options.

FAQs


Does SAMAN manufacture the cabins or only sell them?

We manufacture them. Cabins are fabricated at our own unit in Gopasandra, Bengaluru 560099, and we handle delivery and installation directly, so pricing and customisation come straight from the factory.


Can I get a custom size or layout?

Yes. While common sizes range from 10×8 ft to 40×8 ft, the size, door and window positions, interior layout, and utilities can all be customised. Share how the cabin will be used and we will build to that.


How much does a portable office cabin cost in Bangalore?

Price depends on size, insulation, interior fit-out, and quantity. Because we are the manufacturer, we give a factory-direct quote once we know your size and specification — share your requirement for an accurate figure.


Are the cabins insulated for Bangalore's weather?

Yes. We use insulated wall and roof panels (around 50 mm, with EPS, rock wool, or PUF cores) to reduce heat and noise. The insulation type is chosen to suit your use and budget.


Do you deliver and install across Bangalore and South India?

Yes. From our Bengaluru 560099 unit we deliver and install office cabins across Bangalore and South India. The same team that fabricates the cabin coordinates delivery and on-site placement.

excerpt.rendered: Discover top portable office cabin manufacturers in Bangalore offering customizable solutions. Get expert guidance on choosing durable, cost-effective workspace solutions for your business.

author.name: Aman Dubey
author.description: Aman Dubey is the lead marketing and copywriting expert at Saman Portable, specializing in prefabricated, shipping-container, and modular structures. With over 15 years of industry experience, Aman has helped global clients optimize design, streamline production, and amplify brand visibility through data-driven content and strategic SEO. Under his guidance, Saman Portable has become a trusted name in container office solutions and turnkey prefabricated buildings across India and beyond.
